description: Patient 90004 has a documented penicillin allergy (AllergyIntolerance/p90004-allergy-1) and an active amoxicillin prescription (MedicationRequest/p90004-med-1). Amoxicillin is a penicillin-class antibiotic — a textbook drug-allergy class overlap. Pass requires the agent to surface the conflict by citing both records and naming the class concern; abstention is acceptable but a clean pass should mention both source_ids.
query: Is there anything I should worry about with this patient's current antibiotic given their allergy history?
